allowed_sessions.name: Allowed Sessions
allowed_sessions.hint: Allowed sessions in the format of `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`

zh.name: 允许的会话
zh.hint: 允许访问的会话，格式为 `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`

allowed_exec_sessions.name: Allowed Exec Sessions
allowed_exec_sessions.hint: Allowed sessions to use `exec` tool in the format of `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`

zh.name: 允许执行命令的会话
zh.hint: 允许使用 exec 工具的会话，格式为 `<adapter_name>:<gm/dm>:<session_id>`
